name: Improper Verification of Intent by Broadcast Receiver
description: An Android application registers a Broadcast Receiver to handle system intents but also receives explicit intents from malicious applications. Without proper verification of intent origin, the app may mistake a spoofed intent for a legitimate system broadcast, leading to unintended actions or privilege escalation.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[broadcast_receiver] accepts intents from EXTERNAL[any_app] and forwards data to CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes without an AUTH[intent_verification] node that checks the intent source, action, or permissions
